text.tspan: • Can send new segment if allowed
Why +3? 3 segments left network (3 dup ACKs)
Why inflate? Each dup ACK = segment left network

div.p: ssthresh = max(FlightSize/2, 2MSS) cwnd = ssthresh + 3MSS recover_seq = SND.NXT Retransmit segment at SND.UNA
cwnd += MSS // Inflate window // Can send new segment if allowed
cwnd -= MSS // Deflate window Retransmit first unacked segment
